underlying_goal: Translate a SKILL.md file to Chinese, update blog configuration docs, modify skill requirements, apply skill rules to a blog post, and commit changes across two repos
friction_detail: Claude rewrote the entire SKILL.md instead of just adding new rules, forcing user to revert and re-request; also user rejected the nested git repo cleanup approach and the initial ls permission explanation was incorrect.
brief_summary: User wanted to translate a skill file, investigate permission issues, update blog docs with new skill rules, and commit to two repos — mostly achieved but with one major revert due to over-editing and a rejected cleanup at the end.
